calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson II; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Northridge Cooperative Homes, Inc. is present. Represented by Kevin Barr.
Attorney David John Briggs for the plaintiff.
Defendants Diane Brown & Derrick Brown are present.
Defendant Denise Johnson did not appear. Per counsel, defendant Denise Johnson moved out already, possession is no longer an issue on this defendant.
Attorney James Varellas, II appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of MAY-13-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
